page.title: Concessive And Contrastive Structures
page.subtitle_html: Concessive And Contrastive Structures - C2 ways to balance contrast, concession, and qualification.
page.subtitle_text: C2 ways to balance contrast, concession, and qualification.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Concessive and contrastive structures: compact anchors for although, while, whereas, even though, and related C2 contrast patterns.","rules":[{"label":"Concession","text":"Use although, even though, despite, and in spite of to concede one point while maintaining another.","example":"Although the evidence was limited, the conclusion was convincing."},{"label":"Contrast","text":"Use while and whereas to compare two different facts or positions.","example":"While some experts are optimistic, others remain cautious."},{"label":"Balanced qualification","text":"Place contrast clauses carefully so the main claim remains clear.","example":"The policy is ambitious, even if its implementation remains uncertain."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the Polyglot English C2 lesson on concessive and contrastive structures.
